title: DiceResponse
description: Response for dice roll interpretation. Used for Zod validation on the backend.

narration.description: Dramatic interpretation of the roll result. Flowing prose, 30-50 words, optimized for TTS. Two to three sentences.

success.description: Whether the roll succeeded. True if final result meets or exceeds the difficulty class.

stateUpdates.description: Game state changes resulting from the roll outcome. Only include fields that changed.

healthDelta.description: Change in HP from the roll outcome.

inventoryAdd.description: Items gained as a result of the roll.

inventoryRemove.description: Items lost as a result of the roll.

goldDelta.description: Gold gained or lost from the roll outcome.
